title: dicliptera obtusifolia
intro: Dicliptera obtusifolia, also known as Mexican False Thyme, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating wounds. Dicliptera obtusifolia can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and topical applications.
